name: Haruka Ouma
description: Shu's mother. She works as a senior researcher at Sephirah Genomics, a pharmaceutical company in charge of developing a cure for the Apocalypse Virus. While a professional at work, at home she is very carefree and likes to dote on her son much to his embarrassment.

name: Hayato Fuurinji
description: Miu's grandfather and the undefeated elder of the Ryouzanpaku Dojo, who is said to have beaten 500 Shaolin masters to near death. His kicks have speeds that are still a blur even when viewing a replay of it at 1/1000 of the normal speed. If necessary, he is able to intimidate the other masters in order to maintain peace. Even using just 0.0002% of his power, he can easily overwhelm both Ken'ichi and Miu at the same time and rip a tree in half.
mediaTitles: Kenichi: The Mightiest Disciple: The Attack of Darkness
searchTerms: Kenichi: The Mightiest Disciple: The Attack of Darkness

name: Hideki  Yamamura
description: He is a student of Salt Middle School and a member of the Body Improvement Club.

name: Higuchi
description: An engineer. Tests whether the animal designs will actually function in the physical world. The hardest worker in the office.

name: Hinako  Akuta
description: Hinako Akuta (芥ヒナコ, Akuta Hinako) is one of the seven Crypters, Masters attempting to supplant the Greater History of Man with that of the Lostbelt in Fate/Grand Order: Cosmos in the Lostbelt. Despite her desired Servant class being Rider, she is the Master of Saber Prince of Lanling. She was formerly one of forty eight Chaldea Master Candidates and a member of A-Team. ~!She later appears as Yu Miaoyi, an Assassin-class Servant able to be summoned by Ritsuka Fujimaru.!~

name: Joel Gear
description: __Initial Age:__ 21 __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") Joel is a watchmaker that was found in North America. He was revived to take apart the Petrification Weapon and see what makes it tick.

name: Judy Abbott
description: At the beginning of the series, Judy is an orphan who grew up in the John Grier orphanage. Late, an anonymous benefactor,"John Smith" decides to send her to college as long as she writes him letters telling him about her school life.

name: Jun-Seo Ha
description: Hair color: Black Eye color: Brown Jun-Seo and Jae-Won first got to know each other on internet as anonymous. After Jae-Won found him out in the same school and same grade, they become closer little by little. Jun-Seo is in second year class 7. Doesn't seem to have many friends. Pretty smart, but has a rude way to behave. He can't handle compliments well and gets embarrassed when anyone calls him handsome. He has a poor eye sight. Though he wears contact lens in school, he is seen wearing glasse

name: Junko Asagiri
description: A female rival of Desert Punk. She first met Sunabouzu when she was chased by Mokoto Kawazu, and, succumbing to his weakness with women, he decided to win over Junko by fulfilling her needs...In more ways than one! She uses her ample assets to manipulate him and is known as the "Vixen of the Desert".

name: Kabae
description: Kabae has a very bubbly personality, she loves to talk about her family, and is quick to spread rumors. Despite Kabae's tendency to leave a path of destruction with her rumor spreading, she is a genuinely good person who even went as far as going to Retsuko 's house to care for her while she had a cold.

name: Kagari
description: Courtney is a Team Magma Admin and one of the three "Fires." She is ruthless and skilled with berry juices which she uses to incapacitate opponents. ~!Courtney used to compete in Pokemon Contests. She later joins with Ruby to fight Groudon and Kyogre!~

name: Kana Fujii
description: An apprentice healer in training at Karasuma Voice Treatment Center. She is a happy and upbeat person who enjoys singing. She pines for the healer who assisted her as a youngster. (Source: Official Site, translated, edited)

name: Kaolla Suu
description: An immigrant who resides in the Hinata house in the town of Hinata hot springs. She is a very energetic and innovative youth that is always doing something and can manufacture the most amazing things at a whim. Let's not mention her room, it's a jungle in there!!

name: Kara
description: Kara Lah was a Force-sensitive human female who was the daughter of the legendary sabersmith Zhima Lah.
mediaTitles: Star Wars: Visions: The Manga Anthology
searchTerms: Star Wars: Visions: The Manga Anthology

name: Katori-kun
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Katori is the childhood friend of [Himuro](https://anilist.co/character/151351/Himurokun). He is the descendant of a Phoenix.
mediaTitles: The Ice Guy and His Cool Female Colleague
The Ice Guy and the Cool Girl

The Ice Guy and the Cool Girl

name: Katsuki Shima
description: Katsuki is a boy Misae Sagara met many years ago. She encourages Shima to recover when he is still in his wheelchair. Their meeting leads to the event in Misae's path. ~!It turns out that he is a cat kept by the real Shima, who asked the cat to grant Misae a wish before dying.!~ Several years ago when he was still in a wheelchair he met Misae in a hospital and was encouraged by her to recover. Eventually he finds her again and wants to thank her by granting her wish.

name: Kazuki Ryuusen
description: Usato's classmate and student council vice president. Like Suzune, he was summoned to the Ringle Kingdom as a hero and has an aptitude for light-attribute magic. He is extremely popular with the female students, but on the other hand, he is troubled by the fact that he has no male friends.
mediaTitles: The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic
The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic
The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic

name: Kiki Asukai
description: Kaeru is an essential part of the id wells in _ID: Invaded_. She is a prop created by the Mizuhanome System to aid the "brilliant detectives" in solving crimes. ~! Kiki Asukai was the last victim of the "Challenger". She was rescued by Hunetaro Momoki before she could be killed and is currently missing. !~ ~! It is later revealed that she became a part of the Mizuhanome System after being kidnapped by John Walker. !~

name: Koharu Koga
description: **Height:** 140 cm **Hometown:** Saga Prefecture, Japan In the tie in Cinderella Girls Theater skits, Koharu is shown to be a sweet girl who owns an iguana named Hyou. She wishes to be a princess, and seems to be good at giving compliments. Koharu likes Twister, and hopes to play with the Producer someday. name: Kokoro Fushikawa
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") Heiress of the Fushikawa clan who is the part of class 2-S. Egoistic, has superiority complex. Quite good in martial arts but tries not to fight stronger opponents. (Source: MajiKoi Wiki)
